title: gaya lyallii
intro: Gaya lyallii, also known as the frost lily or New Zealand lily, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gaya lyallii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Gaya lyallii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or in the form of a tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
